Definition: First day of the aggregate period
Unabbreviated location name; typically the city where the test are taken
Region name where tests are taken. This is the first-order civil entity in a country level. Depending on the country, these are states, provinces, or territories, etc

The subregion name where the tests are taken. This is the second-order civil entity in a country level. Depending on the country, these are county-level or provincial-level names. Not all countries display this information.
Place type of the returned result; most often "locality" which is an incorporated city or town political entity
Mobile operator name or "all providers combined"
Aggregation time period. Options include: Day, Week, Month, Quarter, Year
Describes the aggregate type: Availability, Service
The cellular technology as displayed in the portal for the aggregate time period.
The device category for the aggregate time period.
The availability sample count for the aggregate time period.
The unfiltered scan count for the aggregate time period.
The availability device count for the technology type for the aggregate time period.
The total availability device count for the aggregate time period.
This is availability, the percentage of devices in each tech category, in decimal form: device_count/total_device_count
The general service percentage for the aggregate time period.
The LTE availability percentage for the aggregate time period.
The on-network percentage for the aggregate time period.
The unfiltered scan count for the aggregate time period.
The service sample count for the aggregate time period.
The unfiltered device count for the aggregate time period.
The coverage score for the aggregate time period.
The footprint (the fraction of all unique service tiles where the operator has seen service) for the aggregate time period.
